bedtimeban.command.root.none: You haven't set a bedtime yet.
bedtimeban.command.timezone.get.none: You haven't set a timezone yet.
bedtimeban.command.timezone.set.blocked: You already have a ban scheduled! Cannot change timezone.
bedtimeban.command.timezone.set.invalid: No such timezone. Use a standard timezone ID like "US/Pacific", "America/Chicago", or "EDT".
bedtimeban.command.set.invalid_time: The time argument should be a valid bedtime like 11:30pm, 11:30 pm, 23:30, or 23.30.
bedtimeban.command.set.no_timezone: You have not configured your timezone yet. Use `/bedtime timezone` to set your timezone first.
bedtimeban.command.set.already_set: You already have a bedtime set. You can only change it to an earlier future time.
bedtimeban.command.set.same_time: Your bedtime is already set to %s.
bedtimeban.command.set.success: Ok, you will be banned at %s.
bedtimeban.command.cancel.self.success: Your bedtime ban has been cancelled.
bedtimeban.command.cancel.self.none: You do not have a bedtime scheduled.
bedtimeban.command.cancel.target.missing: Could not get UUID for username %s
bedtimeban.command.cancel.target.none: There was not a scheduled ban for %s
